assumptions.text: Phosphate supply diversification claim based on general geological data; specific reserve figures should be verified against USGS Mineral Commodity Summaries.
Lithium intensity comparison (42 g/kWh LFP vs 50-75 g/kWh NMC) based on stoichiometric calculations; exact figures depend on cell design parameters.
Water recovery efficiency of 70-85% based on industrial spray dryer condensate recovery benchmarks; exact recovery rate to be determined during detailed engineering.
Specific university partnerships to be confirmed by project coordinator.
Specific direct employment numbers to be provided by FIB HR planning.
Climate adaptation measures (flood level, drainage design criteria) based on standard Italian engineering practice; site-specific climate risk assessment to be completed during detailed engineering.

open_issues.text: Section 4.1c EU Leadership: Need concrete job creation numbers for Brindisi plant (direct + indirect employment). Request from FIB HR planning.
Section 4.1c EU Leadership: Confirm specific Italian university collaborations for DT development to name in the proposal.
Section 4.1b DNSH Adaptation: Brindisi site-specific climate risk assessment (flood mapping, heat projection, sea level rise) should be completed to substantiate adaptation measures.
Section 4.1a: Quantify the exact production capacity (tonnes/year) to support material efficiency claims with absolute numbers.
Section 4.1c: Verify that Kanthal/Sandvik heating elements and NGK kiln systems are available from EU/EEA sources for EEA-originating content declaration.

key_points: Critical raw material efficiency: LFP eliminates cobalt/nickel dependency
Circular economy: LFP recyclability, brownfield reuse, DT waste minimisation
Water management: closed-loop spray dryer water recovery
Pollution prevention: zero combustion, HEPA filtration, contained atmosphere
First LFP CAM plant in Italy/Southern Europe
Directly addresses C/2025/3236 China dependency (>99% LFP from China)
DT framework as transferable EU IP (ISO 23247 reference implementation)
Job creation in Puglia convergence region
Transparent EU-based supply chain; Battery Passport readiness
FREYR competitive assessment: Vaasa has no FID, US pivot
